title: Add Dark Mode Support to Component
description: Make an existing component work correctly in dark mode.
steps: Replace hardcoded colors with CSS custom properties (--color-*)
Check all borders, shadows, and backgrounds use theme tokens
Verify text contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 in both modes
Test interactive states: hover, focus, active, disabled in dark mode
Handle images/icons: add filter or provide dark-mode variants
Check third-party components: override styles if needed
Test: toggle theme, verify no flash of wrong theme (FOUC)
